headline: MOXY OTTAWA DOWNTOWN NOW OPEN
summary: RIMAP Hospitality Services Inc., one of Canada's leading hotel management companies, is proud to announce that Moxy Ottawa Downtown is now officially open, welcoming guests to a bold new hospitality experience in the heart of the nation's capital.

headline: SKYX Will Supply its Plug & Play Technologies During a Renovation of a Marriott City Center Hotel in Durham, NC
summary: The Hotel is Part of the Shaner Hotel Group, a Prominent Hotel Developer with Over 80 Hotels in the U.S. and Globally The Renovation is in Process and Will Include Rooms, Suites, Lobby, Ballroom, Gym, Bars, Restaurants, Meeting Rooms, Corridors, Among Other Hotel Areas SKYX’s Technologies Expansion Provides Additional Opportunities for Future Recurring Revenues through Interchangeability, Upgrades, AI Services, Monitoring, Subscriptions, Among Others MIAMI, July 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- SKYX

headline: Marriott (MAR) Stock Looks Overvalued On Cash Flow And Earnings
summary: Marriott International’s share price has delivered a strong 166.9% return over the past 5 years, yet both the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and market multiples currently point to the stock trading at a premium rather than at a clear discount. Over 5 years, Marriott International has returned 166.9%, which puts fresh attention on whether today’s price still leaves much room for additional upside before valuation becomes stretched. New projects such as the planned...
